title: How Claude Code's Creator ACTUALLY Automates his work
summary: Austin Marchese analyzes how Boris Cherny, creator of Claude Code, automates workflows using Claude Skills. The video covers Cherny's methodology for deciding which tasks become skills, three execution patterns (agents, hooks, loops), and underutilized features in Claude Code.
